notes: Executed through the approved Coolify operator terminal against the production Postgres container because the local Docker daemon cannot reach the VPS container.
No password, token, connection string, API key, user record, bot record, order payload, position payload, or log payload was written to this artifact.
The drill created a compressed dump in /tmp, restored into an isolated postgres_restore_check_* database, validated aggregate table counts, dropped the restore database, and removed the dump.
